posts.author: bearishbhaiya
posts.text: Creating trading summary videos from Zerodha data – any best practices? — are u makin fr personal journaling or planning to share them publicly? @alishawinson

posts.author: alishawinson
posts.text: Creating trading summary videos from Zerodha data – any best practices? — Hi everyone, I’ve been using Zerodha for trading and managing my portfolio, and I’m trying to make short, simple recap videos of my trades using a free video editor for mac . My basic workflow looks like this: I export trade history / screenshots from Kite or Console Bring them into CapCut and turn them into short recap videos (performance, charts, quick notes) Use those videos for personal tracking and reviewing my trades. Overall it works fine, but I’m running into a few small issues: Chart screenshots sometimes lose a…
